fa-road.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective view receding toward a vanishing point with a dashed center dividing line and road surface; straight highway perspective with lane markings
fa-road.functionalityId: represents a road, street, or driving route in a navigation or mapping interface; indicates a road segment or travel path
fa-road.intentId: navigate along a road or view a driving route on a map; indicate a road segment in a transportation or directions interface

fa-road-barrier.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a horizontal striped construction barrier or sawhorse barricade overlaid across the road surface; road perspective with a striped blockade obstacle
fa-road-barrier.functionalityId: represents a road closure, construction zone, or blocked route; indicates that a road segment is barricaded or impassable
fa-road-barrier.intentId: indicate a road closure or construction blockade on a navigation map; warn drivers of an impassable or restricted road segment

fa-road-bridge.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a curved arch bridge span rising over the roadway, showing arch supports and a deck surface; road perspective with an arched bridge structure overhead
fa-road-bridge.functionalityId: represents a bridge on a road route or a road crossing over water; indicates a bridge structure in a navigation or infrastructure context
fa-road-bridge.intentId: indicate a road bridge or overpass on a navigation map; represent a bridge infrastructure element in a transportation interface

fa-road-circle-check.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a small filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid in the upper corner; road perspective with a circular check approval badge
fa-road-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a road as verified, open, or approved for travel; confirms that a road segment is clear and passable
fa-road-circle-check.intentId: indicate that a road is confirmed open or approved for travel; confirm a road segment's passable status in a navigation interface

fa-road-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark badge overlaid in the upper corner; road perspective with a circular warning alert badge
fa-road-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a road hazard, warning, or alert condition on a route; indicates that a road segment requires attention or has a reported issue
fa-road-circle-exclamation.intentId: warn of a road hazard or alert condition on a navigation map; indicate a road segment with an outstanding issue or caution

fa-road-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a small filled circle containing an X mark badge overlaid in the upper corner; road perspective with a circular closed or blocked badge
fa-road-circle-xmark.functionalityId: represents a road that is closed, blocked, or excluded from a route; indicates that a road segment is unavailable or denied
fa-road-circle-xmark.intentId: indicate a closed or blocked road on a navigation map; exclude a road segment from a route due to closure or restriction

fa-road-lock.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a padlock silhouette overlaid on the road surface; road perspective with a lock symbol indicating restricted access
fa-road-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked, restricted, or access-controlled road segment; indicates that a road requires authorization or is gated
fa-road-lock.intentId: indicate a gated or access-controlled road on a navigation map; represent a restricted or locked road segment in a routing interface

fa-road-spikes.appearanceId: a two-lane road in perspective with a row of sharp upward-pointing spike strips or tire-deflation studs laid across the road surface; road perspective with a spike strip barrier overlay
fa-road-spikes.functionalityId: represents a spike strip, tire-deflation device, or vehicle-stopping barrier on a road; indicates a security checkpoint or forced stop on a route
fa-road-spikes.intentId: indicate a spike strip or vehicle-stopping security barrier on a road; represent a law enforcement checkpoint or access-control device on a route

fa-robot.appearanceId: a boxy robot head silhouette with rectangular eyes, an antenna on top, and a grid or panel body; classic square-headed robot face with antenna and facial feature details
fa-robot.functionalityId: represents a robot, AI agent, or automated system; indicates automation, machine intelligence, or a bot-driven feature
fa-robot.intentId: indicate an automated robot or AI agent feature; represent machine automation or bot functionality in an interface

fa-robot-astromech.appearanceId: a cylindrical astromech-style robot silhouette with a domed head, a central body panel with circular details, and a compact barrel-shaped torso reminiscent of a sci-fi droid; dome-headed cylindrical robot body with panel and port details
fa-robot-astromech.functionalityId: represents a sci-fi astromech droid or companion robot; indicates a futuristic robotic assistant or space-themed automation feature
fa-robot-astromech.intentId: represent a sci-fi droid or astromech robot in a space or gaming context; indicate a companion robot or futuristic automation theme

fa-rocket.appearanceId: a rocket ship silhouette with a pointed nose cone, a streamlined cylindrical body, and small fin stabilizers at the base with flame exhaust; pointed rocket body with tail fins and thruster nozzle
fa-rocket.functionalityId: represents a rocket launch, space travel, or fast startup action; indicates deployment, launch, or a high-speed or ambitious operation
fa-rocket.intentId: launch an application, deploy a project, or indicate a fast or ambitious startup action; represent space travel or a launch event

fa-rocket-launch.appearanceId: a rocket ship silhouette angled upward in mid-launch with a flame or exhaust plume trailing below the tail fins; rocket body tilted at a launch angle with a trailing flame blast
fa-rocket-launch.functionalityId: represents an active rocket launch, deployment in progress, or a fast upward trajectory; indicates a launch event or deployment action underway
fa-rocket-launch.intentId: indicate an active launch or deployment event in progress; represent the start of a project, mission, or high-speed initiative

fa-rod-snake.appearanceId: a vertical staff or rod with a single snake coiled or wrapped around the shaft, rising upward; a caduceus-like single snake entwined on an upright pole
fa-rod-snake.functionalityId: represents the Rod of Asclepius, medical practice, or healthcare; indicates a medical, pharmacy, or health-related feature
fa-rod-snake.intentId: indicate a medical, healthcare, or pharmacy context; represent a health professional or medical service in an interface

fa-roller-coaster.appearanceId: a roller coaster track silhouette with a steep hill peak, a loop or curved descent, and a coaster car near the top; amusement ride track outline with a loop and car on rails
fa-roller-coaster.functionalityId: represents a roller coaster ride or amusement park attraction; indicates a theme park, thrill ride, or entertainment venue feature
fa-roller-coaster.intentId: indicate a roller coaster or amusement park ride; represent a theme park attraction or thrill-ride context in an entertainment interface

fa-rotate.appearanceId: a circular arrow forming a full or near-full loop rotating clockwise or counterclockwise around a central point; single circular refresh arrow in a round rotation path
fa-rotate.functionalityId: rotates, refreshes, or reloads content in a circular motion; triggers a rotation or refresh action in an interface
fa-rotate.intentId: refresh or reload content by rotating it; indicate a rotation or refresh action in a media or data interface

fa-rotate-exclamation.appearanceId: a circular arrow forming a rotation loop with a small exclamation mark badge overlaid at the center or beside the arrow; rotation circular arrow with an alert exclamation badge
fa-rotate-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a rotation or refresh action with a warning or error condition; indicates that a rotation or reload attempt has an associated alert
fa-rotate-exclamation.intentId: indicate a rotation or refresh error or warning condition; alert the user that a reload or rotation action requires attention

fa-rotate-reverse.appearanceId: two circular arrows forming opposite-direction loops, one clockwise and one counterclockwise, suggesting a bidirectional or reverse rotation; paired circular arrows pointing in opposing rotation directions
fa-rotate-reverse.functionalityId: represents a reverse rotation, undo, or bidirectional cycling action; toggles the direction of rotation or reverses a previous action
fa-rotate-reverse.intentId: reverse or undo a rotation action; toggle between two rotation directions in a media or transform interface

fa-route.appearanceId: a curved S-shaped or winding path line with small circular endpoint markers at each end representing a start and finish; winding route line with terminal dot markers at both ends
fa-route.functionalityId: represents a navigation route, path, or directions between two points; displays or plans a travel route on a map
fa-route.intentId: plan or display a travel route between two locations; indicate a navigation path or directions in a mapping interface

fa-route-highway.appearanceId: a curved winding path line with a U.S. highway shield marker badge alongside the route line; route path with a rounded-top highway shield emblem
fa-route-highway.functionalityId: represents a highway route or U.S. numbered highway path; indicates a major road or state highway segment on a navigation map
fa-route-highway.intentId: display or navigate a U.S. highway route on a map; indicate a numbered highway road segment in a directions interface

fa-route-interstate.appearanceId: a curved winding path line with an interstate shield marker badge alongside the route line; route path with a blue-band-top interstate shield emblem
fa-route-interstate.functionalityId: represents an interstate route or numbered interstate highway path; indicates a major interstate road segment on a navigation map
fa-route-interstate.intentId: display or navigate a U.S. interstate highway route on a map; indicate an interstate highway segment in a directions interface

fa-router.appearanceId: a small rectangular network router device silhouette with two or three vertical antenna prongs on top and indicator lights on the front face; router hardware outline with antennas and status LEDs
fa-router.functionalityId: represents a network router or Wi-Fi access point device; indicates network connectivity, internet access, or router configuration
fa-router.intentId: manage or access a network router or Wi-Fi device; indicate network connectivity or internet routing in a device management interface

fa-rows.appearanceId: three or four horizontal rectangular bars stacked evenly one above the other, each spanning the full width; a set of uniform stacked horizontal rows or strips
fa-rows.functionalityId: represents a row-based layout, list view, or table rows; switches to or indicates a horizontal row arrangement in a data display
fa-rows.intentId: switch to or indicate a row-based list or table layout; display data as stacked horizontal rows in a grid or table interface

fa-rss.appearanceId: two or three concentric quarter-circle arc lines radiating outward from a small filled dot at the lower-left corner, resembling a radio signal or Wi-Fi fan; stacked arc waves emanating from a corner dot
fa-rss.functionalityId: represents an RSS feed or web syndication subscription; subscribes to or accesses a content feed from a source
fa-rss.intentId: subscribe to or manage an RSS content feed; access syndicated news or blog updates via a feed reader

fa-rss-square.appearanceId: a square container outline enclosing the same concentric quarter-circle arc waves radiating from a small filled dot at the lower-left corner; RSS signal arc waves contained inside a square badge
fa-rss-square.functionalityId: represents an RSS feed subscription action within a square button or badge element; accesses a content feed from a square UI control
fa-rss-square.intentId: subscribe to or manage an RSS feed from a square button interface; access syndicated content updates in a square-shaped badge control

fa-rub.appearanceId: a capital Cyrillic letter R with one or two horizontal crossbars through the lower stem, forming the Russian ruble currency symbol; ruble monetary glyph with a Р and horizontal bar strokes
fa-rub.functionalityId: represents the Russian ruble currency unit; displays or labels a ruble monetary amount in a financial interface
fa-rub.intentId: display or input a Russian ruble currency value; indicate a ruble denomination in a financial or e-commerce context

fa-rug.appearanceId: a rectangular or oval flat rug shape shown from above with a decorative border pattern and a fringed or tasseled edge along two short ends; flat area rug outline with border motif and fringe ends
fa-rug.functionalityId: represents a floor rug or decorative area carpet; indicates a home furnishing, interior design, or flooring product category
fa-rug.intentId: browse or select a floor rug in a home decor or interior design application; indicate a carpet or area rug product in a furnishing interface

fa-rugby-ball.appearanceId: an oval prolate spheroid rugby ball shape with a pointed tip at each end and lace or seam line markings along the length; elongated oval rugby ball with pointed ends and stitch lines
fa-rugby-ball.functionalityId: represents a rugby ball or the sport of rugby; indicates a rugby match, team, or sporting activity
fa-rugby-ball.intentId: indicate a rugby sport event or team category; access rugby-related content in a sports application

fa-ruler.appearanceId: a flat straight ruler strip lying horizontally with evenly spaced tick marks along one edge indicating measurement increments; long horizontal flat measuring ruler with tick marks
fa-ruler.functionalityId: represents a measuring ruler or linear measurement tool; measures distances or dimensions in a design or drawing interface
fa-ruler.intentId: measure a linear distance or dimension in a design or drawing tool; access a ruler measurement utility in a graphic or layout interface

fa-ruler-combined.appearanceId: two ruler strips joined at a right-angle corner forming an L-shaped measuring corner tool, with tick marks along both arms; L-shaped corner ruler with measurement ticks on both perpendicular arms
fa-ruler-combined.functionalityId: represents a combination square or corner ruler for measuring both horizontal and vertical dimensions simultaneously; measures two perpendicular dimensions in a design interface
fa-ruler-combined.intentId: measure or align elements along two perpendicular axes using a corner ruler; access a combination square measurement tool in a design interface

fa-ruler-horizontal.appearanceId: a single flat ruler strip oriented horizontally with evenly spaced tick marks along the bottom edge; straight horizontal measuring ruler with graduation marks along one edge
fa-ruler-horizontal.functionalityId: represents a horizontal ruler or width measurement tool; measures horizontal distances or widths in a design or layout interface
fa-ruler-horizontal.intentId: measure horizontal distances or widths in a design or layout tool; display a horizontal ruler guide in a graphic editing interface

fa-ruler-triangle.appearanceId: a right-angled triangular set-square shape with tick marks along the two straight edges and a hypotenuse completing the triangle; triangular set-square ruler with angle and measurement markings
fa-ruler-triangle.functionalityId: represents a set-square or triangular ruler for drafting angles and straight lines; measures angles or draws perpendicular lines in a design or drafting interface
fa-ruler-triangle.intentId: draw precise angles or perpendicular lines using a set-square ruler; access a triangle drafting tool in a technical drawing interface

fa-ruler-vertical.appearanceId: a single flat ruler strip oriented vertically with evenly spaced tick marks along the right edge; straight vertical measuring ruler with graduation marks along one side
fa-ruler-vertical.functionalityId: represents a vertical ruler or height measurement tool; measures vertical distances or heights in a design or layout interface
fa-ruler-vertical.intentId: measure vertical distances or heights in a design or layout tool; display a vertical ruler guide in a graphic editing interface

fa-running.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a forward-leaning running stride with one leg extended back and arms bent at the elbows in a jog pose; person figure in a mid-run stride position
fa-running.functionalityId: represents a running activity, jogging, or physical exercise in motion; indicates a run tracking, fitness, or speed-related feature
fa-running.intentId: track a running or jogging activity in a fitness application; indicate physical exercise or movement in a health or sports interface

fa-rupee.appearanceId: a capital letter R with one or two horizontal crossbars through the upper stem, forming the Indian rupee currency symbol; rupee monetary glyph with an R and horizontal bar strokes
fa-rupee.functionalityId: represents the Indian rupee currency unit; displays or labels a rupee monetary amount in a financial interface
fa-rupee.intentId: display or input an Indian rupee currency value; indicate a rupee denomination in a financial or e-commerce context

fa-rupiah-sign.appearanceId: a stylized Rp ligature or a capital R with a subscript p forming the Indonesian rupiah currency symbol; rupiah monetary glyph showing an Rp currency mark
fa-rupiah-sign.functionalityId: represents the Indonesian rupiah currency unit; displays or labels a rupiah monetary amount in a financial interface
fa-rupiah-sign.intentId: display or input an Indonesian rupiah currency value; indicate a rupiah denomination in a financial or e-commerce context

fa-rv.appearanceId: a recreational vehicle or motorhome silhouette with a large boxy cab-over body, wheels along the base, and windows on the side; wide motorhome or RV vehicle outline with cabin windows and wheels
fa-rv.functionalityId: represents a recreational vehicle, motorhome, or road-trip camper; indicates an RV rental, campsite, or overland travel feature
fa-rv.intentId: find or book an RV campsite or rental; indicate a recreational vehicle or motorhome travel option in a trip planning interface

fa-s.appearanceId: a single uppercase or lowercase letter S typographic glyph with a curved double-arc shape; standard Roman alphabet S character
fa-s.functionalityId: represents the letter S in a text, label, keyboard, or alphabet reference; inserts or displays the character S
fa-s.intentId: display or insert the letter S in a text or label field; represent the S character in an alphabet or keyboard interface

fa-sack.appearanceId: a drawstring bag or burlap sack silhouette with a rounded bulging body and a tied or gathered neck at the top; cloth sack outline with a cinched top opening
fa-sack.functionalityId: represents a bag, sack, or storage container for items or currency; indicates a collected loot, goods, or resource storage
fa-sack.intentId: indicate a storage sack or bag of items in a game or inventory interface; represent a container of goods or resources

fa-sack-dollar.appearanceId: a drawstring sack silhouette with a rounded bulging body, a cinched neck, and a dollar sign printed or overlaid on the front face; cloth money bag with a $ symbol on the body
fa-sack-dollar.functionalityId: represents a money bag, financial funds, or a cash reserve; indicates a payment, prize, or currency storage feature
fa-sack-dollar.intentId: indicate a money bag or financial fund in a payment or reward interface; represent a cash prize, budget, or currency reserve

fa-sack-xmark.appearanceId: a drawstring sack silhouette with a rounded bulging body, a cinched neck, and an X mark printed or overlaid on the front face; cloth bag with an X or cross symbol indicating rejection or emptiness
fa-sack-xmark.functionalityId: represents an empty, rejected, or cancelled sack or bag; indicates a failed delivery, empty container, or removed item set
fa-sack-xmark.intentId: indicate an empty, rejected, or cancelled bag of items; represent a failed or cancelled delivery or resource container

fa-sad-cry.appearanceId: a circular face outline with downturned eyebrows, closed or squinting eyes with tear drop shapes streaming down the cheeks, and a wide open frowning mouth; crying face emoji with heavy tears and an open-mouth frown
fa-sad-cry.functionalityId: represents extreme sadness, crying, or distress in an emotional reaction; conveys an intensely sad or upset sentiment in a message
fa-sad-cry.intentId: express extreme sadness, crying, or distress in a message or reaction; indicate a very unhappy or grieving emotional state

fa-sad-tear.appearanceId: a circular face outline with downturned eyebrows, slightly closed eyes with a single small teardrop at the corner, and a gentle downturned mouth frown; mildly sad face with a single tear and soft frown
fa-sad-tear.functionalityId: represents mild sadness, a small tearful emotion, or a gentle unhappiness; conveys a softly sad or disappointed sentiment in a message
fa-sad-tear.intentId: express mild sadness or disappointment in a message or reaction; indicate a gentle unhappy or tearful emotional state

fa-sailboat.appearanceId: a sailboat silhouette viewed from the side with a curved hull, one or two triangular sails on a central mast, and a waterline base; side-profile sailboat outline with triangular sails and hull
fa-sailboat.functionalityId: represents a sailboat, sailing activity, or nautical travel; indicates a marine, sailing, or water sports feature
fa-sailboat.intentId: indicate a sailing or boating activity in a marine or water sports interface; represent a nautical travel or sailing vessel

fa-salad.appearanceId: a bowl shape viewed from above or at an angle filled with leafy greens and vegetable pieces, with a rounded bowl rim; salad bowl outline with leafy vegetable contents
fa-salad.functionalityId: represents a salad dish or healthy food bowl; indicates a salad menu item, vegetarian option, or healthy meal category
fa-salad.intentId: select or display a salad in a food menu or recipe application; indicate a healthy or vegetarian meal option in a dining interface

fa-salt-shaker.appearanceId: a cylindrical salt shaker silhouette with a rounded cap top, a narrow neck, and a wider base body with small holes on the cap for dispensing; tall cylindrical shaker outline with a perforated cap top
fa-salt-shaker.functionalityId: represents a salt shaker or seasoning dispenser in a food or recipe context; indicates a seasoning, condiment, or table setting element
fa-salt-shaker.intentId: indicate a salt or seasoning shaker in a recipe or food interface; represent a condiment dispenser in a kitchen or dining context

fa-sandwich.appearanceId: a sandwich silhouette viewed from the side showing two bread slices enclosing layered fillings such as lettuce, meat, and cheese; side-profile sandwich outline with bread slices and layered filling
fa-sandwich.functionalityId: represents a sandwich food item or a lunch meal; indicates a food menu entry, deli item, or meal category
fa-sandwich.intentId: select or display a sandwich in a food menu or restaurant application; indicate a lunch or deli meal option in a dining interface

fa-satellite.appearanceId: a satellite body silhouette with a central rectangular bus, two extended solar panel wings on either side, and a small dish or antenna extending from the body; orbital satellite outline with solar panels and antenna
fa-satellite.functionalityId: represents an orbital satellite, space-based communication, or remote sensing device; indicates satellite connectivity, GPS, or space technology
fa-satellite.intentId: indicate satellite communication, GPS, or space-based technology; represent an orbital satellite in a space, connectivity, or mapping interface

fa-satellite-dish.appearanceId: a parabolic satellite dish silhouette with a concave round reflector surface and a central feedhorn arm extending from the dish face; round parabolic dish outline with a central arm and feed element
fa-satellite-dish.functionalityId: represents a satellite dish receiver or uplink antenna; indicates satellite television, signal reception, or broadcast communication
fa-satellite-dish.intentId: indicate satellite TV reception or broadcast signal communication; represent a satellite dish or uplink antenna in a connectivity interface
